notes:
NovaPanel v0.6.59

- Fix: updater-helper no longer fails to overwrite NovaPanel.exe when running inside it (EPERM/EBUSY).
- Workaround: rename existing NovaPanel.exe → NovaPanel.exe.old before copying new one; delete .old after copy.
- All other files continue to copy normally; .old cleanup is best-effort (Windows releases the lock when helper exits).
- Added: extracted file count log, zip exists/size logs, final exe exists log — all required instrumentation present.
- Log files use flag 'w' (truncate) for a fresh log each run — easier to read than appended logs.
